records.ety: [AS. bestrīdan; pref. be- + strīdan to stride.]
records.morph: [imp. Bestrode (<?/), (Obs. or R.) Bestrid (<?/); p. p. Bestridden (<?/), Bestrid, Bestrode; p. pr. & vb. n. Bestriding.]

defs: To stand or sit with anything between the legs, or with the legs astride; to stand over
quotes: That horse that thou so often hast bestrid.
Why, man, he doth bestride the narrow world Like a Colossus.

defs: To step over; to stride over or across; as, to bestride a threshold.
